author: Pat
description: Keeps created and updated frontmatter timestamps in sync with Markdown file events. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Release 0.1.1. Built by GitHub Actions with artifact attestations.
releases.name: Frontmatter Timestamps 0.1.1

releases.author: jqml
releases.description:
- Automatic `created` and `updated` frontmatter timestamps for Markdown notes.
- Current-file, current-folder, and vault-wide timestamp update commands with preview commands for bulk operations.
- Safe property rename workflow with preview, confirmation, destination-conflict skipping, and changed/skipped/failed reporting.
- Cleanup command for legacy malformed datetime quote literals.
- Ignored-path and minimum update interval controls for safer automation.
releases.name: Frontmatter Timestamps 0.1.0
